faqs.question: What pests are most common in Annadale homes?
faqs.answer: Annadale residents typically deal with German cockroaches, pavement ants, house spiders, silverfish, and occasional mice or rat issues. Homes near wetland areas may also experience mosquitoes and moisture-attracted pests during warmer months.
